ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "pet_name" TEXT /* Pet name (e.g., Ebony, Jacques) */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the pet (e.g., Black, Brown) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., half sister, litter brother) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the pet */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pet (e.g., male, female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pet */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pet is spayed or neutered */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the pet */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the pet (e.g., up-to-date, not up-to-date) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date of ownership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of ownership (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., half sister, litter brother) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "parentage_type" TEXT /* Type of parentage (e.g., biological, adoptive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "common_parents" (
  "common_parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common parent record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the common parent */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sire, dam) */,
  "parent_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the common parent */,
  "parent_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the common parent */,
  "parent_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the common parent */,
  "parent_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the common parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_common_parents_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "service" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., grooming, training) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider (groomer or trainer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_service_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, groomer, trainer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Colour of the pet (e.g., Black, Brown)
Type of relationship (e.g., half sister, litter brother)
